body.title: uumytickets + uuopentickets: PATH-accessible CLI scripts
body.result: Created /home/akien/bin/uuopentickets and uumytickets — both on PATH, read clan.memories directly, no CC required
body.intention: I intend that Akien can see the full ticket list from any terminal without invoking Claude Code.
body.description:
The /mytickets and /opentickets skills query tickets and summarize in CC. Instead, provide standalone scripts `uumytickets` and `uuopentickets` that Akien can run from any terminal on PATH, replacing both skills and the queue_view.py truncation problem.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/uumytickets (new), lab/claudecode/uuopentickets (new), or devices/bin/; symlink/PATH setup
**Design rules:** Reads clan.memories directly (same DB as cc_queue.py); no CC required to view tickets
**Scope boundary:** In scope: two scripts, on PATH, show all open tickets untruncated (uuopentickets) and akien/guru tickets (uumytickets). Out of scope: mutation operations.
**Completion criteria:** `uuopentickets` and `uumytickets` run from shell, output all open tickets without truncation, exit 0.
